notes: Spain are without pre-tournament absentee Fermín López (fractured metatarsal) and Victor Munoz is a doubt with a hamstring problem; Lamine Yamal and Nico Williams were only used as substitutes in MD1 but are expected to start here following De la Fuente's rotation reset. Saudi Arabia have no injury or suspension concerns and coach Georgios Donis is tipped to field an unchanged XI from the organized 1-1 draw with Uruguay.
